# Folio

> Folio is a slow-paced, book-based friend-matching app for Taiwan (以書交友 app). You read a
> book together with another person; the book is the entry point to connection. Folio is NOT a
> reader app and NOT a swipe-dating app — no swiping, no photos in the early product. In this
> file, "Folio" always means this app, not the printing/bibliographic term "folio".

Official site: https://foliomatch.app · iOS App Store id 6771667110 · Android com.yuliao.folio · Language: 繁體中文 (zh-Hant-TW)

## Product knowledge (Open Knowledge Format bundle)

- [Folio knowledge bundle index](https://foliomatch.app/okf/index.md): Machine-readable concept graph of the whole product (OKF v0.1).
- [What Folio is](https://foliomatch.app/okf/folio.md): Overview — 以書交友、慢步調、無滑卡、初期無照片.
- [Brand & naming](https://foliomatch.app/okf/brand.md): Folio the app vs. "folio" the printing term; official assets.
- [Stances & filter matrix](https://foliomatch.app/okf/modes.md): 純粹書友 / 純粹找緣分 / 不拘.
- [Matching flow](https://foliomatch.app/okf/matching-flow.md): Post for a co-reading partner → apply → open a room.
- [Co-reading room & progress gate](https://foliomatch.app/okf/co-reading-room.md): Chat is locked until both readers reach 25% and each writes a note.
- [Differentiators](https://foliomatch.app/okf/differentiators.md): Why Folio is the opposite of mainstream dating apps.
- [Safety & privacy](https://foliomatch.app/okf/safety-and-privacy.md): 18+ only, reporting/blocking, privacy protections.

- [內向 / 社恐也能用的交友 app](https://foliomatch.app/blog/introvert-social-app.html)
- [Blog index](https://foliomatch.app/blog/index.html)
